title: stelis steinbachii
intro: Stelis steinbachii, also known as Orchid Tree or Orchid Vine, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis steinbachii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies for various health conditions.
